name: Nutty Chocolate & Mashmallow Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare muffin pans by greasing or lining with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooking chocolate, melted margarine (or butter), sour cream (or yogurt), brown sugar, egg, and vanilla extract. Mix well until the ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Fold in the walnuts and chopped marshmallows.
7. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
